allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Agregar botones Notificar en pestaña Final Definitiva

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(ssh root@168.231.75.16 "cd /root/normy-login-page && git pull origin main && cd /root && docker compose up -d --build notasnormy")
Bash(ssh root@168.231.75.16 "docker exec n8n-postgres psql -U n8n -d n8n -t -c ""SELECT id, name FROM workflow_entity;""")

Bash(ssh root@168.231.75.16 "docker exec n8n-postgres psql -U n8n -d n8n -t -c ""SELECT id, name FROM workflow_entity WHERE name LIKE ''%Normy%'' OR name LIKE ''%Agente%'' OR name LIKE ''%Enviar%'' OR name LIKE ''%Aviso%'' OR name LIKE ''%actividades%'' OR name LIKE ''%Comunicado%'' OR name LIKE ''%Notas%'';""")
Bash(ssh root@168.231.75.16 "docker exec n8n-postgres psql -U n8n -d n8n -t -c ""SELECT id, name FROM workflow_entity WHERE nodes::text ILIKE ''%materia%'';""")

Bash(ssh root@168.231.75.16 "docker exec n8n-postgres psql -U n8n -d n8n -t -c ""
SELECT name, 
  regexp_matches\(nodes::text, ''.{0,40}[Mm]ateria.{0,40}'', ''g''\) as contexto
FROM workflow_entity 
WHERE nodes::text ILIKE ''%materia%''
LIMIT 50;
""")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\)\) for node in data: name = node.get\(''name'', ''''\) ntype = node.get\(''type'', ''''\) # Look for tool nodes or nodes related to comunicado if ''tool'' in ntype.lower\(\) or ''comunicado'' in name.lower\(\) or ''enviar'' in name.lower\(\) or ''http'' in ntype.lower\(\): print\(f''--- {name} \({ntype}\) ---''\) params = node.get\(''parameters'', {}\) print\(json.dumps\(params, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:2000]\) print\(\) ")
